up.method: reported concentration only; >90% degraded, no specific rate given

sec.method: HPLC main product, no numeric value in text
HPLC, no numeric value in text

growth_records.cite: Ioannou et al. Resource sharing of an infant gut microbiota synthetic community in combinations of human milk oligosaccharides. The ISME Journal (2024). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wrae209. [PMC11542058]
growth_records.snippet: Basal medium with 0.4% w/v 4HMO or 5HMO mix was used ... A flow rate of 12.5 ml/h ensured complete refresh of the medium within 24 h.
growth_records.notes: Same reactor setup as 4HMO record but with 5HMO mix (includes LNT). Dilution rate D = 12.5/300 = 0.0417 /h; community mu = D = 0.0417 /h; td = ln2/D = 16.6 h. Whole-community rate. Metabolite concentrations only in figures (mM), no numeric secretion rates extractable.
